Feature-wise Models

Setup

Load packages

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ ggplot2   3.5.2     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.0.4     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(glmmTMB)
library(emmeans)
## Welcome to emmeans.
## Caution: You lose important information if you filter this package's results.
## See '? untidy'
# library(AfterSl1p)
source('scripts/stats/functions.R')
theme_set(theme_bw())

Read in data

dat = read.delim('data/clean/coloniz_model.txt')
head(dat)
##     Sample raw_count Group Category  Donor feature    Cage order log_count
## 1 A1E02M01        21    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin   cageP first  3.044522
## 2 A1E02M02        19    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin   cageP first  2.944439
## 3 A1E02M04        18    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin   cageE first  2.890372
## 4 A1E02M05        23    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin   cageE first  3.135494
## 5 A1E02M07        22    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin cage312 first  3.091042
## 6 A1E02M08        21    AB      Pup DonorA     Bin cage312 first  3.044522
##   feature_size   z_count prop_count zprop_count
## 1           46 0.9769412  0.4565217   0.9154750
## 2           46 0.6239818  0.4130435   0.5384471
## 3           46 0.4475021  0.3913043   0.3499331
## 4           46 1.3299007  0.5000000   1.2925029
## 5           46 1.1534210  0.4782609   1.1039889
## 6           46 0.9769412  0.4565217   0.9154750
summary(dat)
##     Sample            raw_count          Group             Category        
##  Length:224         Min.   :    2.0   Length:224         Length:224        
##  Class :character   1st Qu.:   13.0   Class :character   Class :character  
##  Mode  :character   Median :   36.5   Mode  :character   Mode  :character  
##                     Mean   : 6986.1                                        
##                     3rd Qu.: 2850.2                                        
##                     Max.   :50892.0                                        
##     Donor             feature              Cage              order          
##  Length:224         Length:224         Length:224         Length:224        
##  Class :character   Class :character   Class :character   Class :character  
##  Mode  :character   Mode  :character   Mode  :character   Mode  :character  
##                                                                             
##                                                                             
##                                                                             
##    log_count        feature_size         z_count           prop_count     
##  Min.   : 0.6931   Min.   :   27.00   Min.   :-2.02321   Min.   :0.07407  
##  1st Qu.: 2.5649   1st Qu.:   38.75   1st Qu.:-0.79920   1st Qu.:0.25926  
##  Median : 3.5541   Median :   69.00   Median : 0.03025   Median :0.39130  
##  Mean   : 4.8098   Mean   :23136.88   Mean   : 0.00000   Mean   :0.43517  
##  3rd Qu.: 5.6704   3rd Qu.:22047.00   3rd Qu.: 0.78652   3rd Qu.:0.56522  
##  Max.   :10.8375   Max.   :96857.00   Max.   : 2.27682   Max.   :0.93478  
##   zprop_count       
##  Min.   :-2.197304  
##  1st Qu.:-0.753211  
##  Median :-0.005139  
##  Mean   : 0.000000  
##  3rd Qu.: 0.744436  
##  Max.   : 2.339540
dat = (dat
       %>% mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c('AB', 'BA', 'ABAB')),
                  Donor = factor(Donor),
                  order = factor(order, levels = c('mixed', 'second', 'first')),
                  feature = factor(feature),
                  count = raw_count,
                  size = feature_size))
summary(dat)
##     Sample            raw_count        Group      Category            Donor    
##  Length:224         Min.   :    2.0   AB  :80   Length:224         DonorA:112  
##  Class :character   1st Qu.:   13.0   BA  :64   Class :character   DonorB:112  
##  Mode  :character   Median :   36.5   ABAB:80   Mode  :character               
##                     Mean   : 6986.1                                            
##                     3rd Qu.: 2850.2                                            
##                     Max.   :50892.0                                            
##     feature       Cage              order      log_count      
##  Bin    :56   Length:224         mixed :80   Min.   : 0.6931  
##  Gene   :56   Class :character   second:72   1st Qu.: 2.5649  
##  MAG    :56   Mode  :character   first :72   Median : 3.5541  
##  Species:56                                  Mean   : 4.8098  
##                                              3rd Qu.: 5.6704  
##                                              Max.   :10.8375  
##   feature_size         z_count           prop_count       zprop_count       
##  Min.   :   27.00   Min.   :-2.02321   Min.   :0.07407   Min.   :-2.197304  
##  1st Qu.:   38.75   1st Qu.:-0.79920   1st Qu.:0.25926   1st Qu.:-0.753211  
##  Median :   69.00   Median : 0.03025   Median :0.39130   Median :-0.005139  
##  Mean   :23136.88   Mean   : 0.00000   Mean   :0.43517   Mean   : 0.000000  
##  3rd Qu.:22047.00   3rd Qu.: 0.78652   3rd Qu.:0.56522   3rd Qu.: 0.744436  
##  Max.   :96857.00   Max.   : 2.27682   Max.   :0.93478   Max.   : 2.339540  
##      count              size         
##  Min.   :    2.0   Min.   :   27.00  
##  1st Qu.:   13.0   1st Qu.:   38.75  
##  Median :   36.5   Median :   69.00  
##  Mean   : 6986.1   Mean   :23136.88  
##  3rd Qu.: 2850.2   3rd Qu.:22047.00  
##  Max.   :50892.0   Max.   :96857.00

Look at the data distribution

ggplot(dat, aes(count)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~feature, scales = 'free')
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.

Run Models

mods_out = loop_mods(dat, feats = unique(dat$feature))
pr_df = mods_out[['prdf']]
mod_lst = mods_out[['mods']]

Model Diagnostics

fr_plt = ggplot(pr_df, aes(fitted, resid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~feature, scales = 'free')
fr_plt
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

abs_fr_plt = ggplot(pr_df, aes(fitted, abs(resid))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
  facet_wrap(~feature, scales = 'free')
abs_fr_plt
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

qq_plt = ggplot(pr_df, aes(sample = resid)) +
  geom_qq() +
  geom_qq_line() +
  facet_wrap(~feature, scales = 'free')
qq_plt

These are not great (gene is the messiest) but they are not terrible. We can use these models.

Extract p-values & coefficients

contr_df = get_contr_pv(mod_lst)
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
head(contr_df)
## # A tibble: 6 × 9
##   numerator denominator estimate     SE    df t.ratio p.value within_don feature
##   <chr>     <chr>          <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl>   <dbl> <chr>      <chr>  
## 1 second    mixed        -0.0337 0.0331    47   -1.02 4.98e-1 DonorA     Bin    
## 2 first     mixed         0.0870 0.0312    47    2.79 1.48e-2 DonorA     Bin    
## 3 second    mixed        -0.0659 0.0312    47   -2.11 7.50e-2 DonorB     Bin    
## 4 first     mixed         0.0433 0.0331    47    1.31 3.34e-1 DonorB     Bin    
## 5 second    mixed        -0.0523 0.0313    47   -1.67 1.82e-1 DonorA     MAG    
## 6 first     mixed         0.138  0.0296    47    4.65 5.36e-5 DonorA     MAG
write.csv(contr_df, file = 'Results/Stats/feature_model_results.csv')

Estimates plot

est_plt_feat = ggplot(contr_df, aes(numerator, estimate, colour = within_don)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = estimate - 1.96*SE,
                     ymax = estimate + 1.96*SE),
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~feature) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DonorA" = "#7b3294",
                                  "DonorB" = "#008837"),
                     name = 'Donor') +
  labs(y = 'Difference from mixed',
       x = 'Order')
est_plt_feat

ggsave('Results/Stats/est_plot_features.png', plot = est_plt_feat)
## Saving 7 x 5 in image
